# Sandbox Demo Evidence Template

Use this template when creating, reviewing, extending, reseeding, resetting, or retiring a demo account.

## Metadata

- Date:
- Reviewer:
- Requester:
- Account name:
- `account_id`:
- Demo owner email:
- Reason: new demo / sales demo / QA / support reset / expiry review / conversion review

## Sandbox Status

- Mode:
- Lifecycle status:
- Seeded fixture version:
- Demo expires at:
- Last seeded at:
- Reset requested at:
- Contains real customer data: yes / no / unknown
- Billing active: yes / no / unknown

## Action

- Action requested:
- Action approved by:
- Action performed by:
- Reset/reseed method: onboarding page / `reset_demo_account` RPC / no action
- SQL or UI evidence captured:

## First-Value Checks

| Check | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Dashboard summary loads | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Properties include occupied and vacant examples | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Tenants include linked tenant | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Finance shows due/overdue context | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Maintenance Inbox has sample issue | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Work order path is available | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Command Center or Portfolio Health has next-step context | pass / fail / not checked |  |
| Onboarding page shows fixture status/reset | pass / fail / not checked |  |

## Outcome

- Demo ready: yes / no
- Follow-up owner:
- Follow-up due:
- Customer/prospect update needed:
- Notes:
